name: Cordycepin
description: Cordycepin has been used in trials studying the treatment of Leukemia.

interactions.name: Cisapride
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cisapride can be increased when it is combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Progesterone
interactions.description: The absorption of Progesterone can be decreased when combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Dofetilide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Dofetilide can be increased when it is combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Quinidine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Quinidine can be increased when it is combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Ranolazine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ranolazine can be increased when it is combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Buspirone
interactions.description: The metabolism of Buspirone can be decreased when combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Cordycepin.

interactions.name: Didanosine
interactions.description: Didanosine can cause a decrease in the absorption of Cordycepin resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.

interactions.name: Cyclosporine
interactions.description: The metabolism of Cyclosporine can be decreased when combined with Cordycepin.

interactions.description: The serum concentration of Etravirine can be increased when it is combined with Cordycepin.
